title: AWS Marketplace: Agentic AI Ordering Agent
search_path_label: 采购 / 招投标 / Marketplace 路径
full_text:
Agentic AI Ordering Agent
Info
Sold by: Accenture
The Agentic AI Buying Agent, developed by Accenture, Amazon Business, and AWS, automates enterprise procurement from end to end. It processes curated orders, places them, and tracks delivery in real time-seamlessly integrating with existing workflows. Built on Strands Agents, it supports secure, flexible deployment across leading agent frameworks and foundation models
Request private offer
Overview
Pricing
Legal
Support
Overview
Try agent mode
Create proposal
Ask question
Accenture, Amazon Business, and Amazon Web Services today unveiled an AI Ordering Agent, their first collaborative intelligent agent designed to transform enterprise procurement. The AI Ordering Agent automatically processes fully curated orders-managing delivery specifications, payment terms, and location details-while independently placing orders, capturing confirmations, and monitoring delivery status in real-time. Operating as a critical component within broader workflow orchestration systems, the AI Ordering Agent ensures reliable execution while maintaining continuous communication with existing management platforms. Built on Accenture's Strands Agents it aims to simplify the creation and operation of AI agents. It allows organizations to securely deploy AI agents developed using popular frameworks such as LangChain and CrewAI, while also supporting integration with any foundational models for maximum flexibility in implementation.
Highlights
End-to-End Procurement Automation, Transform Enterprise Procurement, Autonomous Order Placement
